rankings.why_it_matters: Outlines RBI's strategic priorities (AI, UPI, cybersecurity) for the next three years, shaping the financial system's evolution.

rankings.title: RBI issues draft on review of NBFC-Upper Layer framework
rankings.india_relevance: Proposed regulatory overhaul for systemically important NBFCs in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Major regulatory shift proposing new asset thresholds; could bring large PSUs and groups like Tata Sons under stricter supervision, impacting capital and governance.

rankings.title: New scheme in works to support domestic critical mineral processing plants: Mines Secretary
rankings.india_relevance: Policy to build India's domestic processing capacity for minerals like lithium and nickel.
rankings.why_it_matters: Aims to reduce import dependence for batteries and electronics, crucial for India's EV and energy transition ambitions.

rankings.title: West Asia crisis is not a profiteering opportunity: Shipping Minister Sarbananda Sonowal
rankings.india_relevance: Government warns against exploiting the supply chain crisis for unfair gains.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals regulatory intent to curb price gouging in shipping and logistics, directly impacting import/export costs for Indian businesses.

rankings.title: Two India-bound ships among a few transiting Hormuz Strait on Day 2 of ceasefire
rankings.india_relevance: Direct report on the resumption of critical shipping traffic for Indian trade.
rankings.why_it_matters: Quantifies the immediate, tangible impact of geopolitical developments on India's trade flows through the world's most important oil chokepoint.

rankings.title: Textiles see tariff scars, exports to US drop 29% in February; China hit most
rankings.india_relevance: Data on India's key export sector facing significant headwinds.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows real trade damage from US tariffs, impacting a major employment sector; indicates potential for supply chain reallocation as China is hit harder.

rankings.title: Haryana hikes wages after unrest; auto sector faces cost pressure
rankings.india_relevance: Labour policy change in a major Indian industrial hub linked to inflation from the Iran conflict.
rankings.why_it_matters: Demonstrates how geopolitical-driven inflation is triggering wage-price spirals and impacting competitiveness in a key manufacturing sector.

rankings.title: Induction cooking could raise power demand by 27 GW
rankings.india_relevance: Analysis of how a government push for electric cooking could transform India's power demand profile.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a massive, new source of base load demand, with implications for grid planning, generation mix, and renewable integration targets.

rankings.title: Tractor sales cross 10 lakh mark in FY26 on strong rural demand, GST cut
rankings.india_relevance: Signals robust rural economic activity and the impact of fiscal policy.
rankings.why_it_matters: A key rural demand indicator hitting a record high suggests underlying consumption strength, important for gauging broader economic health beyond urban centers.

rankings.title: Unincorporated construction GVA at Rs 7.98 lakh; 10.27 lakh units engaged
rankings.india_relevance: Official data revealing the scale and productivity of India's informal construction sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Provides a rare, quantified look at a massive informal economic segment, critical for understanding employment, productivity, and GDP measurement.

rankings.title: Government plans weekly system to track EXIM trends
rankings.india_relevance: New government mechanism to monitor trade flows in real-time during crisis.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows administrative adaptation to global volatility; aims for faster policy response to trade disruptions impacting Indian exporters and importers.

rankings.title: It’s Not Just Oil. A Blocked Hormuz Risks Hiking the Price of Nearly Everything You Buy
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the broad inflationary mechanism of a Hormuz blockade for an import-dependent economy like India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Goes beyond oil prices to detail how shipping costs and supply chains for all goods would break down, directly impacting Indian consumers and producers.

rankings.title: Vietnam's Vingroup signs pact to invest $6.5 billion in Maharashtra
rankings.india_relevance: Major foreign investment commitment in Indian EV and manufacturing.
rankings.why_it_matters: A substantial FDI pledge in a strategic sector (EVs), indicating India's pull as a manufacturing destination amid global supply chain shifts.

rankings.title: Datanomics: Minorities face disadvantage in India's labour market
rankings.india_relevance: Data-driven analysis of labour market inequalities in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a structural social-economic issue with implications for consumption patterns, policy design, and human capital utilization.

rankings.title: Qatar assures India of steady energy supply despite LNG disruptions
rankings.india_relevance: Crucial bilateral assurance on LNG supplies amid regional conflict.
rankings.why_it_matters: Provides clarity on energy security for India's gas-dependent industries and power plants, mitigating a key risk from the West Asia crisis.

rankings.title: After 7-yr delay, Odisha hands over land for Chandikhol oil reserve project
rankings.india_relevance: Progress on strategic petroleum reserve infrastructure.
rankings.why_it_matters: Advancing India's strategic oil buffer capacity, a long-term energy security measure whose urgency is highlighted by current geopolitical risks.

rankings.title: Share of Indian employees ‘engaged’ at work on a decline, says report
rankings.india_relevance: Trend analysis of workforce productivity and satisfaction in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Declining engagement has implications for corporate productivity, talent retention, and the quality of economic growth.

rankings.title: Wholesale rice prices up 7% as West Asia ceasefire fuels export rush
rankings.india_relevance: Shows how geopolitical events directly influence pricing of a key Indian food staple and export.
rankings.why_it_matters: Links global ceasefire to domestic food inflation and farmer incomes, demonstrating the complex trade-offs in agricultural export policy.

rankings.title: BEE plans to slash 'super credits' for strong hybrid cars in CAFE-3
rankings.india_relevance: Policy shift in India's automotive fuel efficiency norms.
rankings.why_it_matters: Will alter automaker strategies, potentially disincentivizing hybrids and pushing the industry faster towards full electric vehicles.

rankings.title: SEBI uncovers ₹2,950-crore Ponzi-like network, fines Trdez ₹1 crore
rankings.india_relevance: Regulatory action against a large-scale investment fraud in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights ongoing vulnerabilities in India's retail investment landscape and regulatory efforts to clean up market practices.

rankings.title: EU airline industry warns of fuel shortages if Strait of Hormuz stays closed
rankings.india_relevance: Global supply chain risk with indirect impact on India's aviation sector and international travel costs.
rankings.why_it_matters: A second-order effect: global aviation turmoil would impact Indian airlines, air cargo, and passenger travel, even if India's direct fuel supply is managed.

rankings.title: Govt proposes overhaul of company incorporation rules to cut paperwork, enable risk-based checks
rankings.india_relevance: Potential reform to ease doing business for Indian companies.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals a move towards smarter, trust-based regulation for businesses, which could lower compliance costs and speed up formalization.

rankings.title: Fintechs bet big on digital FDs, eye larger share of retail savings
rankings.india_relevance: Trend of fintechs disrupting traditional retail banking in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows intensifying competition for India's household savings, forcing banks to innovate and potentially raising deposit rates for consumers.
